name: Quantize to 2 decimal places (banker's rounding)
short_description: Rounds a number to two decimal places using banker's rounding (half up).

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The number to be quantized or rounded.

name: Currency Formatting
short_description: Formats a numerical value as currency with thousands separators and two decimal places.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The numerical value to be formatted.

name: Round and Format Percentage
short_description: Rounds a numeric value to two decimal places and formats it as a percentage string (e.g., 0.05 becomes "5.00%").

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The numeric value (e.g., a decimal percentage like 0.05) to be rounded and formatted.

name: Random Percentage Rate Generator
short_description: Generates a random percentage rate within a specified range, expressed as a decimal with two decimal places.

inputs.name: min_pct
inputs.description: The minimum percentage value (e.g., 5 for 5%) for the random rate generation.

inputs.name: max_pct
inputs.description: The maximum percentage value (e.g., 15 for 15%) for the random rate generation.

name: Single-Rate Income Tax on Annual Income
short_description: Calculates the income tax due based on a flat tax rate applied to annual income.

inputs.name: annual_income
inputs.description: Annual income subject to tax

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: Flat income tax rate in percentage (e.g., 20 for 20%)

name: Income Tax with Standard Deduction (Easy)
short_description: Calculates income tax owed after applying a standard deduction to annual income, using a single flat tax rate.

inputs.name: annual_income
inputs.description: The individual's annual gross income.

inputs.name: standard_deduction
inputs.description: The amount of standard deduction claimed.

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: The flat tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 25 for 25%).

name: Income Tax with Itemized Deductions
short_description: Compute taxable income after itemized deductions and apply a single rate.

inputs.name: annual_income
inputs.description: Annual gross income

inputs.name: deductions
inputs.description: Total eligible itemized deductions

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: Tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 25 for 25%)

name: Capital Gains Tax: Shares Sale (Intermediate)
short_description: Calculates capital gains tax on the sale of shares, ensuring the sale price is greater than the purchase price.

inputs.name: purchase_price
inputs.description: Original price paid for the shares.

inputs.name: sale_price
inputs.description: Price at which the shares were sold.

inputs.name: cap_gains_rate
inputs.description: Capital gains tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 15 for 15%).

name: Double Taxation Relief (Advanced)
short_description: Compute home-country tax on foreign income, foreign tax paid, the eligible relief (minimum rule), and the net home-country tax liability after relief.

inputs.name: foreign_income
inputs.description: Total income earned from a foreign country.

inputs.name: home_rate
inputs.description: Home-country tax rate on foreign income (as a percentage).

inputs.name: foreign_rate
inputs.description: Foreign tax rate applicable to the foreign income (as a percentage).

name: Generate Financial Templates
short_description: A utility to generate problem instances for various financial calculation templates with different random seeds and save them to a specified JSON file.

inputs.name: output_file
inputs.description: The path to the JSON file where the generated problem instances will be saved.

inputs.name: num_instances
inputs.description: The number of problem instances to generate for each financial template listed internally.
